/usr/bin/ar qc libi2pdclient.a CMakeFiles/libi2pdclient.dir/libi2pd_client/AddressBook.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pdclient.dir/libi2pd_client/BOB.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pdclient.dir/libi2pd_client/ClientContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pdclient.dir/libi2pd_client/HTTPProxy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pdclient.dir/libi2pd_client/I2CP.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pdclient.dir/libi2pd_client/I2PService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pdclient.dir/libi2pd_client/I2PTunnel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pdclient.dir/libi2pd_client/MatchedDestination.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pdclient.dir/libi2pd_client/SAM.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pdclient.dir/libi2pd_client/SOCKS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pdclient.dir/libi2pd_client/UDPTunnel.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libi2pdclient.a
